'''wabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wackily|wackily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wackily|wackily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wabate|wabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wabatesher|wabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wabatesherĂ«m|wabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wabatero|wabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wabateshĂ«|wabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wabateshĂ«m|wabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwabatero|gokiwabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwabateshĂ«|gokiwabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwabateshĂ«m|gokiwabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowabankerom|gowabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowabankeshĂ«|gowabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowabankeshĂ«m|gowabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowabankeya|gowabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wabaterom|wabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wabatemu|wabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wabateya|wabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwabaterom|gokiwabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwabatemu|gokiwabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwabateya|gokiwabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wababate|wababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wababatesher|wababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wababatesherĂ«m|wababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wababatero|wababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wababateshĂ«|wababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wababateshĂ«m|wababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwababatero|gokiwababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwababateshĂ«|gokiwababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwababateshĂ«m|gokiwababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowababankerom|gowababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowababankeshĂ«|gowababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowababankeshĂ«m|gowababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowababankeya|gowababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wababaterom|wababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wababatemu|wababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wababateya|wababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwababaterom|gokiwababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwababatemu|gokiwababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwababateya|gokiwababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠte|wĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠtesher|wĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠtero|wĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠbĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠterom|wĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠtemu|wĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠbĂŠteya|wĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠbĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠbĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafbafte|wafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafbaftesher|wafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafbaftesherĂ«m|wafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafbaftero|wafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafbafteshĂ«|wafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafbafteshĂ«m|wafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafbaftero|gokiwafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafbafteshĂ«|gokiwafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafbafteshĂ«m|gokiwafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafbafnkerom|gowafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafbafnkeshĂ«|gowafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafbafnkeshĂ«m|gowafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafbafnkeya|gowafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafbafterom|wafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafbaftemu|wafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafbafteya|wafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafbafterom|gokiwafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafbaftemu|gokiwafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafbafteya|gokiwafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
